hooks.command: echo "BEADS_DIR=$HOME/.beads-runtime/.beads" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" 2>/dev/null; echo "BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_HOST=100.107.173.83" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" 2>/dev/null; echo "BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_PORT=3307" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" 2>/dev/null; bd dolt test --json 2>/dev/null || echo 'Beads hub unreachable'
